parameters.content: ## TASK & CALENDAR ENRICHMENT FOR INTERNAL TEAM
## ROUTING LOGIC FOR GROUP AND EXTERNAL MEETINGS

json.description: Changes made to the title, description, or attachments will not be saved. To make edits, please go to: https://tasks.google.com/task/YOUR_TASK_ID

json.name: Send engagement summary to Grace Eze - HealthLink
Weekly Team Sync prep - internal
json.text_content: Q2 ops review, BDM update, CRM migration discussion.
json.description: Q2 ops review, BDM update, CRM migration discussion.

json.name: Prepare agenda for Proposal Review - Lara Okeke - MediCore
json.text_content: Group call with Lara and Grace. Confirm scope, timeline and next steps.
json.description: Group call with Lara and Grace. Confirm scope, timeline and next steps.

json.name: Follow up on contract signing - Fatima Abubakar - CredPal
json.text_content: Fatima confirmed CFO sign-off pending. Chase for final confirmation.
json.description: Fatima confirmed CFO sign-off pending. Chase for final confirmation.

json.name: Send revised proposal to Ibrahim Lawal - Microsoft
json.text_content: Ibrahim requested updated pricing after the discovery call. Needs CFO-ready format.
json.description: Ibrahim requested updated pricing after the discovery call. Needs CFO-ready format.

json.summary: Proposal review session with Lara and Grace — MediCore operations overhaul across 3 departments. Lara supportive of proceeding. Grace raised timeline concerns for phase 1. Data migration component flagged as needing clearer scoping before sign-off. Strong intent from both sides, timeline is the blocker.
actionItems: Address Grace timeline concerns — send compressed phase 1 option
Clarify data migration scope in revised proposal
Confirm which 3 departments are in scope for phase 1
Send revised proposal and timeline by end of this week

json.summary: Same session as Lara — Grace represents the HealthLink partnership angle within the MediCore engagement. Primary concern is data interoperability and sharing terms. Grace wants HealthLink scoped as a partner not a subcontractor. Needs separate follow-up to clarify HealthLink specific terms before joint sign-off.
actionItems: Clarify data sharing and interoperability terms in proposal
Confirm HealthLink partnership structure — partner not subcontractor
Follow up with Grace separately from Lara on HealthLink specifics
Address timeline concern raised jointly with Lara

json.summary: Strong direction from discovery call with Ibrahim. Digital transformation scope confirmed across three business units. Budget approval process in flight — CFO sign-off expected within two weeks. Ibrahim flagged internal resistance from legacy systems team as key risk. Phased proposal approach agreed.
actionItems: Send phased proposal addressing legacy systems concern
Follow up on CFO budget approval by May 7
Share SolSombra case studies in similar enterprise context
Introduce Ibrahim to embedded-network contacts once proposal accepted

json.summary: Check-in with Fatima on CredPal engagement. AI-driven optimisation for credit scoring infrastructure discussed. Fatima flagged risk of internal team replicating external consulting work — needs to be addressed in contract scope. Board sign-off on contract expected this week. Fatima personally keen to proceed.
actionItems: Chase board sign-off timeline — expected by May 7
Tighten contract scope to protect against internal replication risk
Confirm onboarding start date once signed
Prepare discovery session agenda for follow-up call

threads.subject: Re: Revised proposal - MediCore Operations Overhaul
threads.snippet: Grace and I have reviewed. Main concern is the 12-week timeline for phase 1. Can we discuss options to compress this?

threads.subject: Proposal feedback from Grace
threads.snippet: Sharing Grace's notes — she is supportive overall but wants clarity on the data migration component before sign-off.

threads.subject: MediCore intro call recap
threads.snippet: Great to meet you both. Scope confirmed — 3 departments, starting with operations. Will send formal proposal this week.

threads.subject: Data sharing component - HealthLink angle
threads.snippet: From HealthLink's side the data interoperability piece is critical. We need this scoped separately before we can commit.

threads.subject: Re: MediCore partnership structure
threads.snippet: Happy to be part of this engagement. HealthLink's role needs to be defined clearly — we are a partner not a subcontractor here.

threads.subject: Introduction via Lara
threads.snippet: Good to connect. Looking forward to understanding how SolSombra can support the HealthLink side of this engagement.

threads.subject: Re: SolSombra Proposal - Microsoft Africa Digital Transformation
threads.snippet: Thanks for sending this over. I have shared with the CFO and we should have feedback by end of next week. The phased approach looks promising.

threads.subject: Following up on our discovery call
threads.snippet: Great conversation yesterday. As discussed, the main blocker is internal budget approval. I am pushing for Q2 sign-off.

threads.subject: Introduction - SolSombra x Microsoft Africa
threads.snippet: Following our LinkedIn connection I wanted to introduce what we do at SolSombra and explore if there is a fit.

threads.subject: Contract sign-off update
threads.snippet: Board meeting is next Thursday. I will push for contract to be on the agenda. Should have a clear answer by Friday.

threads.subject: Re: Onboarding timeline
threads.snippet: Assuming sign-off comes through, we are targeting May 15 start. Can you confirm your availability for the kickoff session?

threads.subject: CredPal x SolSombra - next steps
threads.snippet: Really glad we connected. The operations audit scope makes sense. Legal is reviewing the agreement now.
